data.name: settings.section.dataDownload.description
data.value: Sync the current store catalog from the server and refresh the local checkout item index.

data.name: settings.section.dataReset.description
data.value: Force a fresh local catalog rebuild when data looks stale, prices do not refresh, or the product index needs a clean reset.

data.name: settings.square.description
data.value: Use a Square access token to load locations and terminal devices.

data.name: settings.square.switchHelp
data.value: Switch to another paired Square terminal in the same location, then save to use it for the next payment.

data.name: settings.square.tokenStatus.cached
data.value: Local encrypted token cached. HBPOS refreshes it when Square rejects it.

data.name: settings.square.tokenStatus.missing
data.value: No local token cached. The next Square request will fetch one from HBPOS.

data.name: settings.square.tokenHelp
data.value: Square token is stored encrypted on this device and fetched from HBPOS when missing or rejected.

data.name: settings.square.deviceCodesHelp
data.value: Create a device code, enter it on the Square Terminal, then refresh the status to map the paired terminal back into the device selector.

data.name: settings.square.deviceCodes.unsupported
data.value: Square Device Codes are only supported in Production. Sandbox mode keeps device switching available but disables pairing maintenance.

data.name: settings.linkly.description
data.value: Connect to the local Linkly EFT-Client, then enable ANZ Linkly for card payments.

data.name: settings.deviceRegistration.description
data.value: Submit a fresh registration request for this checkout device while keeping the current cart and order sync safety checks in place.

data.name: settings.status.noSquareDevices
data.value: No Square devices returned for this location.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceSwitchPendingSave
data.value: Selected {0}. Save Square to switch the next payment to this terminal.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodeNameRequired
data.value: Enter a device code name first.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodeCreated
data.value: Created device code {0} for {1}. Enter it on the Square Terminal, then refresh status.

data.name: settings.status.selectSquareDeviceCode
data.value: Select a Square device code first.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodeNotPaired
data.value: Device code is not paired yet. Current status: {0}.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodePaired
data.value: Device code paired successfully. {0} is selected and ready to save for the next payment.

data.name: settings.status.loadSquareBeforeSave
data.value: Load Square locations and devices before saving.

data.name: settings.status.squareSaved
data.value: Square terminal settings saved. The next payment will use {0}.

data.name: settings.status.testLinklyBeforeSave
data.value: Test Linkly connection before enabling ANZ Linkly.

data.name: settings.status.catalogDownloadNotConfigured
data.value: Catalog download service is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.catalogResetNotConfigured
data.value: Catalog reset service is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.reregisterNotConfigured
data.value: Device reregistration service is not configured.
